The Tool

Three modules.
One complete Pinterest system.

From URL to published pin — without the overwhelm.

Module 01

The Content Generator

Paste a URL or a whole list, choose your tone, and watch PinCraft generate viral-ready titles, SEO-optimised descriptions, and detailed image prompts — all at once.

  • Bulk generation: Paste up to 20 URLs or upload a CSV. Process them all simultaneously.
  • Smart tone control: Choose Friendly & Engaging, Direct & Sales-Focused, or Witty & Humorous.
  • SEO keywords built-in: 5–7 high-traffic keywords suggested per pin, automatically.
  • One-click Spin: Don't love a result? Regenerate just that title or description without losing anything else.
  • Load Preset: Save your favourite settings and apply them in one click every session.
  • Pinterest CSV export: Export directly to upload to Pinterest or schedule via Tailwind / Metricool.
Module 02

The Mockup Generator

Upload a basic product photo (or skip it entirely) and let PinCraft place it into a high-quality styled scene — with crisp, readable text overlaid right on top.

  • Scene presets: Photorealistic, Cozy Morning, Professional Office, Coffee Shop, and more.
  • Typography engine: Real, crisp text overlay — no blurry AI-generated mess other tools produce.
  • Seasonal themes: One click to turn any pin into a seasonal variation — Christmas, Spring, and more.
  • Custom Image Prompt: Set a brand-specific style prompt prepended to every generated image. NEW
  • Multiple AI image models: Switch models to nail your exact aesthetic — photorealistic, illustrated, artistic. NEW
  • 9:16 Pinterest standard output by default — no resizing or cropping needed.
Module 03

The Content Tracker

An intelligent URL inventory that keeps your account safe, your content organised, and tells you exactly what to pin next — every single day.

  • 7-day auto-cooldown: Automatically prevents pinning the same URL within 7 days — no more spam flags. NEW
  • Status dashboard: Ready, Scheduled, Cooldown, Paused — see your entire content queue at a glance.
  • Sitemap import: Populate your entire inventory from your site's XML sitemap in seconds.
  • Save keywords & titles: Attach custom SEO keywords and blog titles to each URL directly. NEW
  • Flexible date editing: Adjust publish dates on any URL, anytime, with no restrictions. NEW
  • Post to Pinterest boards: Schedule pins with date, time, and board selection — directly from the tracker. NEW
What's New

The upgrades creators actually asked for.

PinCraft AI ships new features regularly. Here's everything that just landed.

📌

Direct Pinterest Scheduling NEW

Schedule pins directly to your Pinterest boards with a date, time, and board — exported as a ready-to-upload CSV. Your content pipeline is now fully automated.

🔒

7-Day Auto-Cooldown NEW

Once a URL is scheduled, it enters a 7-day cooldown automatically. Pinterest won't flag you — PinCraft handles the safety valve so you never have to think about it.

🖼️

Multiple Image Models NEW

Choose from different AI image generation models to get your exact aesthetic — photorealistic, illustrated, or artistic. Your pins, your style.

✍️

Custom Image Prompt NEW

Write your brand style prompt once and it gets prepended to every image you generate. Consistent, on-brand aesthetics across all your pins without extra effort.

🏷️

Keyword & Title Memory NEW

Save custom keywords and blog titles directly to each URL in your tracker. Your SEO context stays attached to your content — no more hunting through spreadsheets.

🗓️

Flexible Date Control NEW

Edit publish dates on any URL in your tracker with full flexibility. Reorganise your entire content calendar anytime, without any restrictions.

🗂️

Bulk File Delete NEW

Select all, select a few, delete in one click. Keep your My Files library clean without the tedious one-by-one cleanup.

Questions? Answered.

What is "Bring Your Own Key" (BYOK)?
With the Pro plan, you connect your own free Google Gemini API key. PinCraft AI uses your key to generate content — so there's no added AI cost passed on to you. Google's Gemini API has a generous free tier that handles heavy daily use with ease.
Do I need design skills to use the Mockup Generator?
Not at all. Choose a style, upload an optional product image, type your headline, and click Generate. PinCraft handles the scene creation and text overlay. The result is a professional, Pinterest-ready pin — no Canva or Photoshop needed.
How does the 7-day cooldown protect my Pinterest account?
Pinterest can flag accounts that post the same URL too frequently. PinCraft's Content Tracker automatically locks a URL for 7 days after it's been scheduled. This keeps your pinning patterns safe and your account healthy — completely automatically.
Can I use PinCraft AI for multiple blogs or websites?
Yes! The Pro plan supports up to 5 separate blogs, each with their own URL inventory, scheduling, and Pinterest board connections. Perfect if you run multiple sites or content channels across different niches.
Is the content actually unique — or will every pin look the same?
Every generation is unique. The AI writes fresh titles and descriptions each time, and the Spin feature lets you regenerate individual fields instantly. Even multiple pins for the same URL will look and read completely differently.
Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
Yes. Manage or cancel your subscription anytime from your Gumroad account. No questions asked, no cancellation fees. You keep full access through the end of your current billing period.
